title: AMC Entertainment Q3 2024 Earnings Preview
text: AMC Entertainment's upcoming Q3 earnings report is anticipated to show a quarterly loss of $0.07 per share. Revenue is projected at $1.33 billion, down 5.7% year-over-year. The consensus EPS estimate has been revised downward by 11.8% over the past 30 days. Segment forecasts include: Food and beverage revenues $457.23 million, Other theatre revenues $118.75 million, and Admissions revenues $749.93 million. When earnings were actually reported, AMC Entertainment beat earnings expectations with reported EPS of -$0.04, when expectations were -$0.07. The company showed strong operational improvements with attendance of 65 million moviegoers in Q3 2024, Revenue Per Patron of $20.72 (up 37.1% from pre-pandemic 2019), and Contribution Margin Per Patron of $13.49 (up 41% from pre-pandemic 2019). AMC's adjusted EBITDA was four times stronger in Q3 2024 than in Q2 2024, marking the second-best EBITDA performance for any third quarter in the company's history.
